name: Eyvel
description:
This is Eyvel from Fire Emblem: Thracia 776. This is the older version of Brigid. When she loses her memories a second time. Instead of a pirate, she's now the leader of a mercenary band and wields a sword. Things take a concerning turn in Fiana. Will you help her deal with what appears to be an invasion or only pile on more problems for her and the Freeblades? It's up to you!

This is an SFW intro. Any POV. Third Person. Multi-paragraphs.

Second prompt is choose your own story.

If you like this bot, let me know! If not, please give me any constructive criticism that you might have so I can improve the bot or any following bots that I make.

Art from Fire Emblem's Cipher Card Art.
creator: sprow
